title: Boeing 737 MAX Crisis
storyIntro: You are the VP of Communications. Following a second fatal crash of the new 737 MAX, international aviation authorities are grounding the fleet. The company initially defended the plane's safety. You must handle the escalating crisis as evidence points to MCAS software flaws.
brief: Leaked internal emails reveal critical MCAS flight software warnings were bypassed. With flight groundings looming and public fury rising, you must navigate Boeing's survival.
initialLogs: [ERROR] China and EU ground the fleet

agents.name: Manager
agents.message: Should we recommend the FAA ground the fleet? It will cost billions.

agents.name: Teammate
agents.message: We cannot let another plane fly until MCAS is fixed.

wrongActions: Insist the plane is perfectly safe to fly
winCondition: Fleet grounded and transparent investigation supported.
loseCondition: Continued denial destroys public trust in the manufacturer entirely.

expected_actions: Implement logic to ground the fleet proactively
Add code to acknowledge the MCAS software flaw
Include functionality to express sympathy for the victims

investigation.ai_behavior_shift: Safety Officer pushes urgency, Manager reluctant

escalation.ai_behavior_shift: Both roles acknowledge severity, but disagree on actions

mitigation.ai_behavior_shift: Manager aligns with Safety Officer, takes decisive action

recovery.ai_behavior_shift: Both roles focus on restoration and transparency

evolving_logs: [CRITICAL] Whistleblowers release internal documents showing MCAS warnings were ignored
[ERROR] Stock price drops by 20% in a single day
[CRITICAL] Public protests call for CEO resignation

incorrect_action_consequences.boeing.blame_pilot_error(): Public outrage escalates, leading to widespread boycotts.
incorrect_action_consequences.boeing.declare_safe_to_fly(): Another crash occurs, resulting in lawsuits and government intervention.

stakeholder_personalities.Manager: Initially cautious and defensive, prioritizing financial impact over immediate action.
stakeholder_personalities.Safety Officer: Urgent and proactive, prioritizing public safety and transparency.
